records.summary: London Locks is an exceptionally well-credentialed locksmith with 20+ years of trading, named founder Lloyd Morgan, MLA approved membership, a physical shop address, and a 12-month parts and labour warranty. The founder has appeared on BBC Watchdog specifically as an anti-scam authority, making this one of the strongest trust profiles in the industry.
records.topOpportunity: Embedded Google Reviews widget — the page references a review image asset but has no live review integration, which is the one visible trust gap on an otherwise strong page.
records.notes: This is a cold lead with minimal web agency opportunity — the site is mature, trust signals are extensive, and the founder is a recognised industry authority; only a Google Reviews integration or a light UX refresh would be a realistic sell.
